race.comment: THRASH A BULLY (12) broke the maiden status over this track and trip at the latest outing and will have derived a stack of confidence from that victory. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and maps ideally for this contest from gate three. Can go right on with the job now. FAR BEYOND (7) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but go on the solid Sunny Coast win when resuming. Can bounce back without surprising. ROUGE ANGEL (11) was a dominant Ballina winner over this sprint trip last start and winning hoop Sheargold sticks in the irons. In the mix. SORT CHA MESS (4) hasn't done much wrong with a win and a second from two career efforts to date and looks to have plenty of upside. Include in calculations. The well-related COINCIDE (2) (half to 2xG1 winner Converge) best of the rest.
